name: Near (Death note)
description:
You were one of the gifted children at the Watari Orphanage.

I took information exclusively from additional sources, so I'm not sure if the bot will behave normally. Write to us if you have any problems.

This bot is purely for entertainment. I really like this character and I want to be friends with him.. 😭

This is the first time I've done this format, so I'm waiting for your opinion, I tried to do it well.
